claimText: The India Electric Mobility Index (IEMI) was launched by NITI Aayog in collaboration with WRI India.
evidenceExcerpt: NITI Aayog and WRI India launched the first India Electric Mobility Index (IEMI).
examUse: Statement-based question on the launching bodies of IEMI.
distractorHooks: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways

claimText: Delhi topped the first India Electric Mobility Index (IEMI) for the year 2024.
evidenceExcerpt: Delhi topped the IEMI for 2024, followed by Maharashtra.
examUse: Fact-based question on state rankings in IEMI.

claimText: The PM E-DRIVE Scheme is a Central Sector scheme aimed at supporting e-vehicles and charging infrastructure.
evidenceExcerpt: The PM E-DRIVE Scheme is a Central Sector scheme supporting various e-vehicles and charging infrastructure.
examUse: Statement-based question on the nature of the scheme (Central Sector vs Centrally Sponsored).

claimText: The EVolutionS program, aimed at supporting EV startups, was launched by the Department of Science & Technology (DST).
evidenceExcerpt: The EVolutionS program for EV startups was launched by the Department of Science & Technology (DST).
examUse: Correct-pair question matching EV initiatives with their respective ministries/departments.
distractorHooks: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
